marketing.heroSubtitle: Deploy bilingual voice and chat agents with enterprise knowledge, security, and on-prem options.
marketing.useCasesSubtitle: From municipalities to banks — agents that speak Montenegrin naturally.
marketing.howStep1Desc: Sign up and configure your organization in minutes.
marketing.howStep2Desc: Upload policies, FAQs, and documents with access controls.
marketing.howStep3Desc: Embed in your site or connect voice channels.
marketing.knowledgeDesc: Hybrid retrieval, reranking, and access groups keep answers accurate and compliant.
marketing.securityDesc: Session auth, CSRF protection, tenant isolation, and audit trails.
marketing.deploymentDesc: Run fully managed or deploy on-prem for regulated industries.
marketing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, scale as you grow.
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Create your workspace and launch your first agent today.

auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Set PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in .env.
auth.googleLoadFailed: Could not load Google sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
auth.googleNotReady: Google sign-in is still loading. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.step5Desc: Upload PDF, Word, text, or Markdown files. Your agent will use them for more accurate answers.
onboarding.uploadPrompt: Drag files here or click to browse
onboarding.uploadHint: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, and more — up to 25 MB per file
onboarding.driveDesc: Drive import is coming soon — it requires separate Google permissions and integration beyond sign-in.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.browserDesc: Embed Montenegrina in your website with a lightweight script.
integrations.phoneDesc: Connect telephony for inbound and outbound voice.
